item.title: Fatal Fury: City of the Wolves DLC character Wolfgang Krauser launches April 24
item.content:encoded:
• PC
  • PS4
  • PS5
  • Xbox Series

The Emperor of Darkness.

Fatal Fury: City of the Wolves Season 2 downloadable content character Wolfgang Krauser will launch on April 24, SNK announced.

Here are the latest details, via SNK:

Wolfgang Krauser (voiced by Patrick Seitz in English, Yutaka Aoyama in Japanese)

Ruled the sinister underbelly of society as the Emperor of Darkness, until he fell in battle to the resilient fang of the Hungry Wolf—or so the rumors, spread by his own offspring, would have the public believe. Now, years later, the son of the sovereign has a fighting tournament of his own; for Krauser, whose ruthlessness has only grown with time, it is the perfect chance to strike. The stage is set—not a requiem for the fallen, but an overture to revenge.

  • ❮
  • ❯

Krauser in Arcade Mode and Episodes of South Town

  • Arcade Mode – Krauser vows to reclaim his life as the omnipotent Emperor of Darkness, and retribution against one man in particular—Terry Bogard, the Hungry Wolf himself—will allow him to do just that.
  • Episodes of South Town – Krauser’s single-player RPG adventure sees him stalk the streets of South Town to further his sinister ambitions. How has the City of the Wolves changed in his absence? Where does his focus now fall?

Major Update

In addition to Krauser’s release, Fatal Fury: City of the Wolves will receive a major update on April 24 to mark its first anniversary. A special YouTube stream on April 23 will feature voice actors Takashi Kondo and Chika Anzai as the team looks back on the game’s first year, with video retrospectives, community highlights, developer messages, and more. Details on the major anniversary update will be revealed during the stream.

Fatal Fury: City of the Wolves is available now for PlayStation 5, Xbox Series, PlayStation 4, and PC via Steam and Epic Games Store.

Watch a new trailer below. View a new set of screenshots at the gallery.

DLC Character Wolfgang Krauser Trailer

English

Japanese



https://www.gematsu.com/2026/04/fatal-fury-city-of-the-wolves-dlc-character-wolfgang-krauser-launches-april-24
item.dc:creator: invalid@example.com (ResetEra_Newsbot

item.title: Wuthering Waves version 3.3 update ‘Reverbs From the End of Galaxies’ launches April 30
item.content:encoded:
• PC
  • PS5
  • Smartphone

New Resonators Hiyuki and Denia join the fray.

Kuro Games will release the version 3.3 update for free-to-play open-world action RPG Wuthering Waves, dubbed “Reverbs From the End of Galaxies,” on April 30, the developer announced.

Here is an overview of the update, via Kuro Games:

Version 3.3 Overview

  • Gifts of Grand Celebration
    • When the rewards become available, log in to the game to claim them. For more details about the event rules, stay tuned for official announcements.
  • Second Coming of Solaris: Collab Season
    • Participate in anniversary celebration events to win 2nd Anniversary Coins and use them to unlock various rewards. For more details about the event rules, stay tuned for official announcements.
  • Bountiful Waves
    • Complete Convene Tasks and Activity Tasks to earn Spindrifts, which can be exchanged for various items in the Bountiful Waves. For more details about the event rules, stay tuned for official announcements.
  • Into the Memory Program!
    • Participate in the web event to review your journey in Solaris.
  • Initial Top-Up Bonus Reset
    • Following the Version 3.3 update maintenance, the initial top-up bonus (double amount) will be reset for all price tiers in the Store.
  • Optimizations
    • Outfit Accessory
      • Introduced a new Outfit Accessory system. Equip and change compatible Accessories for select Resonators.
    • Expedition Motorbike Optimizations
      • Added a new motorbike ability: Aerial mode. Added a new motorbike module: Aerial Tactics.
    • User Interface Update
      • Optimized the user interface for the Resonators, Team, Data Bank, Guidebook, and Backpack pages
      • Added new ways to view and switch a Resonator’s “Resonance Mode” within some of the game’s interfaces.
      • Added Convene animations for some 5-Star weapons in the “Absolute Pulsation” Weapon Convene.
    • Graphics and Performance Optimizations
      • Version 3.3 will introduce self-developed mobile frame generation, designed to enhance in-game performance on mid-range mobile devices, helping maintain a steadier and more comfortable frame rate while also reducing power consumption.
      • Version 3.3 will add an “Anisotropic Filtering” graphics option on PC, enabling improved texture quality, sharper surface textures, and enhanced overall visual clarity.
      • In Version 3.3, DLSS Super Resolution will support DLAA; on compatible PCs, enabling DLAA allows the game to deliver finer image quality with greater visual detail when rendered at native resolution.
    • Game Client Optimizations
      • The Resource Cleanup feature on mobile will now allow you to remove certain map environment resources.
      • With the Resource Download Options feature on mobile, the minimum resources required to run the game will be further reduced in Version 3.3.
      • We will continue to work on minimizing the game’s disk space requirements.
    • Stay tuned to official announcements for updates on more optimizations.
  • New Main Quests
    • Chapter III Segue: Wishes in the Bell
    • Chapter III Act V: Starlights from Yesterdays
    • Chapter III Segue: Beneath a Melting Night Sky
  • New Outfit
    • Plush Dream
  • New Expedition Motorbike Liveries
    • Crystal Sky – Chassis & Snow, Moon, and Flowers – Expedition Motorbike Livery
      • Purchasable from the Store.
    • Flowers For You – Expedition Motorbike Livery
      • Obtainable via Second Coming of Solaris: Collab Season.
  • New Expedition Motorbike Collaboration Liveries
    • Crossworld Sync: Pt. 1
      • Collab Livery: Resident Evil
      • Collab Livery: Angry Birds
      • Collab Livery: Kaiju No. 8
      • Collab Livery: Soshiro Hoshina (Kaiju No. 8)
      • Notes:
        • Obtainable in Crossworld Sync: Pt. 1.
        • About “Crossworld Sync: Pt. 1”: “Resident Evil 30th Anniversary,” “Angry Birds,” and “Kaiju No. 8” Collaboration Event. Complete tasks in the Collaboration Event to obtain the corresponding Collaboration Livery and various leveling Materials. The collaboration intellectual properties are listed in no particular order and are for display purposes only.
    • Crossworld Sync: Pt. 2
      • Collab Livery: PRAGMATA
      • Collab Livery: Riders Republic
      • Collab Livery: Hinata Shoyo (HAIKYU!!)
      • Collab Livery: Kageyama Tobio (HAIKYU!!)
      • Notes:
        • Obtainable in Crossworld Sync: Pt. 2.
        • About “Crossworld Sync: Pt. 2”: “PRAGMATA,” “Riders Republic,” and “HAIKYU!!” (Anime) Collaboration Event. Complete tasks in the Collaboration Event to obtain the corresponding Collab Livery and various leveling Materials. The collaboration intellectual properties are listed in no particular order and are for display purposes only.
  • New Echoes
    • Voidwing Moth
  • New Sonata Effects
    • Reel of Spliced Memories
    • Wishes of Quiet Snowfall
  • New Phantom Echoes
    • Phantom: Reactor Husk
    • Phantom: Reminiscence – Kronaclaw
  • New Tactical Hologram Challenge
    • Tactical Hologram: Sigillum
  • New Area
    • Roya Frostlands: Dimmr Plains
  • New Permanent Event
    • Into the Land of Paradox
  • New Resonators
    • Hiyuki
    • Denia
  • Upcoming Featured Resonator Convene
    • Phase I
      • Thousand Futures Mirrored in Snow
      • Distant May the Starlights Be
      • Across Time’s Waxes and Wanes
    • Phase II
      • False Promise for Tomorrow
      • Horizon of Dawnbreak
      • Requiem Without End
  • New Weapons
    • Frostburn
    • Forged Dwarf Star
  • Upcoming Featured Weapon Convene
    • Phase I
      • Frostburn
      • Starfield Calibrator
      • Moongazer’s Sigil
    • Phase II
      • Forged Dwarf Star
      • Kumokiri
      • Lethean Elegy
  • Special Events
    • Star Bouncing Anniversary Event
    • Cubie Derby: Championship Anniversary Event
    • Lollo Express: Promise Delivered Anniversary Featured Commission Event
    • Gifts of Grand Celebration Anniversary Limited-Time Login Event
    • Bountiful Waves Anniversary Points Exchange Event
    • Dimmr Traces Area Exploration Event
    • Dimmr Travelogue Photo Collection Event
    • Gifts of Starlight 7-Day Login Event
    • Depths of Illusive Realm: Chromatic Fantasy Featured Combat Event
    • Aced! Combat Mastery Test! Featured Combat Event
    • Beyond the Waves: Roya Frostlands Featured Exploration Event
    • Back to Solaris Web Event
  • World Tour
    • To The New World
  • Collaboration
    • Wuthering Waves x Razer
    • Wuthering Waves x S.H.Figuarts
    • Wuthering Waves x Funism

Wuthering Waves is available now for PlayStation 5, PC via client download, Steam, and Epic Games Store, iOS via App Store, and Android via Google Play, and is coming to Xbox Series and PC via Microsoft Store in July.

Watch a new set of trailers below.

Version 3.3 Trailer

English

Japanese

Korean

Version 3.3 Special Broadcast

English

Japanese

Korean
